ein.name: Ein

findings: 0.72-1.27 spread: F1 (top ~35% cold) 34-feather burst lump resolves at cast-instant BEFORE her own True-Damage +55.3% buff -> x1.553 under-credit (fix delaySec on lump); F2 between-burst trickle keyed to FB-count but really time-cadenced -> spread. 34/burst+6/rotation are Prydwen-tier (not kit-derivable, ein-focus recording needed)

ein.evidence: Run E: 0.89-0.98; orb gauge from datamined arena data
ein.residual: U8 lists an older 0.71-0.76 read — worth an ein-focus recording

skill1: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Summons 4 Near Feathers.

caveats: skill2: Near Feather cadence (34 instances per her burst, 6 per rotation between bursts) is a community-sourced (Prydwen) estimate, not kit-derivable — kit only states 4 feathers at battle start + 6 summoned at burst; needs an ein-focused recording (U8)
skill2: the between-burst feather trickle is keyed to full-burst COUNT (6 per FB end), not to time — comps with long rotations under-count it, fast rotations over-count it

burst: the 34-feather burst lump resolves at cast-instant, BEFORE her own True Damage ▲ 55.3% burst buff and teammates' full-burst-entry auras register (block order) — real feathers land inside the 10s window with those buffs up

records.comp: PE2 elec DPS RERUN w/ video (boss Water)
